overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing two characters canoeing down a wilderness river. The journey progresses from calm brown waters into turbulent white-water rapids with rocky obstacles, set in a forested valley with a distant tower visible against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: calm river section with forested banks

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe steadily downstream through calm brown water, maintaining a straight course

notable_agents.action: companion sitting in the bow of the canoe facing forward

entered.detail: long wooden canoe with two occupants paddling through the river
brown calm water with gentle ripples and reflections
dense green deciduous trees lining the left riverbank
dense green deciduous trees lining the right riverbank
large gray boulder protruding from the water on the right side of the river
tall thin industrial tower visible on the horizon against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a calm river section with two characters in a wooden canoe. The water is brown and tranquil, surrounded by dense green forest on both banks. A large rock formation looms on the right side as the canoe approaches, while a distant tower is visible on the horizon. The player character paddles steadily from the stern.

events.description: river water transitions from calm brown to turbulent white-water rapids with greenish foam and churning currents

agents.ego_description: paddling vigorously as the canoe accelerates into the turbulent rapids, water splashing around the hull

notable_agents.action: companion in the bow bracing against the increased motion of the rapids

entered.detail: turbulent white water with foam patches and visible current flows
fine water mist rising from the churning rapids

segments.scene_description: The canoe enters a section of white-water rapids where the water transforms into churning greenish foam. The calm brown water is left behind as mist rises from the turbulent currents. The forested banks remain visible on both sides while the canoe picks up speed through the rapids.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky rapids requiring navigation between boulders

events.description: canoe makes a sharp turn to the left to navigate between large rocks in the rapids

agents.ego_description: actively steering the canoe through the rocky obstacles, alternating paddle strokes to maneuver between large boulders

entered.detail: section of river with multiple large rocks creating obstacles and narrow channels
massive gray boulders emerging from the water creating navigation hazards

segments.scene_description: The final segment features technical navigation through a rocky rapids section where large boulders emerge from the water. The canoe weaves between obstacles while white water churns around the rocks. The riverbanks feel closer and more enclosed, with mist continuing to rise from the turbulent water as the canoe maneuvers through the hazardous course.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wooden canoe transitions from a tranquil river stretch into a series of turbulent, rocky rapids. It begins on calm brown waters surrounded by dense green forest, with a distant tower on the horizon and a large rock formation looming to the right. As the canoe picks up speed, the brown water transforms into churning greenish foam and rising mist, signaling the entry into white-water rapids. The scene then shifts into a technical navigation phase where the riverbanks feel more enclosed and large boulders emerge from the water. Finally, the camera follows the canoe as it weaves through these hazardous obstacles while white water churns violently around the rocks.
